chapters.title: A New Beginning

chapters.title: The Rising Threat

chapters.title: The Final Confrontation

lore.title: The Age of Chaos
lore.content: In the beginning, the world was formless and chaotic. The gods shaped the lands and populated them with life.

lore.title: The Great Schism
lore.content: When the gods disagreed, the world split into realms of light and shadow, each claiming their followers.

lore.title: The Story of The Iron Brotherhood - Part 1
lore.content: The Iron Brotherhood traces its origins to the first settlers who braved the wilds and carved civilization from the wilderness.

lore.title: The Story of The Void Collective - Part 2
lore.content: The The Void Collective once controlled all trade routes, but their monopoly was broken when rival factions formed alliances.

lore.title: The Story of Wanderers' Pact - Part 3
lore.content: Members of the Wanderers' Pact swear an oath upon admission to protect the secrets of their order until death.

lore.title: The Prophecy of issavi
lore.content: In the darkest hour, The Iron Brotherhood and The Void Collective shall rise to confront the ancient evil lurking within issavi. Only through unity can the world be saved from eternal darkness.

factions.name: The Iron Brotherhood
factions.description: Warriors bound by honor to protect the innocent.

factions.name: The Void Collective
factions.description: Servants of the void seeking to unmake reality.

factions.name: Wanderers' Pact
factions.description: A loose alliance of travelers and explorers.

npcs.name: Elder Theron
npcs.dialogue_greeting: Greetings, adventurer. I need your help.

npcs.name: Merchant Grix
npcs.dialogue_greeting: Looking to buy or sell? I've got what you need.

npcs.name: Wanderer Nyssa
npcs.dialogue_greeting: Nice weather we're having... considering everything.

npcs.name: Commander Draven
npcs.dialogue_greeting: Thank the gods you're here! We need assistance.

npcs.name: Trader Zara
npcs.dialogue_greeting: Welcome! Browse my wares, all top quality.

npcs.name: Ranger Finn
npcs.dialogue_greeting: We stand together against the darkness.

Elder Theron.speaker: Elder Theron
Elder Theron.text: We need someone capable for a dangerous mission.

Elder Theron.speaker: Elder Theron
Elder Theron.text: I have a task that requires a brave adventurer.

Elder Theron.speaker: Elder Theron
Elder Theron.text: The council has authorized me to hire mercenaries.

Merchant Grix.speaker: Merchant Grix
Merchant Grix.text: I have wares from across the land.

Merchant Grix.speaker: Merchant Grix
Merchant Grix.text: Looking for something special? I've got it.

Merchant Grix.speaker: Merchant Grix
Merchant Grix.text: My prices are fair, considering the danger.

Mage Celestia.speaker: Mage Celestia
Mage Celestia.text: I've been tracking the enemy's movements.

Mage Celestia.speaker: Mage Celestia
Mage Celestia.text: We should plan our approach carefully.

Mage Celestia.speaker: Mage Celestia
Mage Celestia.text: I know a shortcut through the mountains.

Beast Tamer Grul.speaker: Beast Tamer Grul
Beast Tamer Grul.text: You've been a thorn in my side for too long!

Beast Tamer Grul.speaker: Beast Tamer Grul
Beast Tamer Grul.text: This is where your journey ends!

Beast Tamer Grul.speaker: Beast Tamer Grul
Beast Tamer Grul.text: No one has ever survived facing me!
